parameters.name: sponser
parameters.description: Account ID of the sponsor. Every account in the response will either be sponsored by the given account ID or have a subentry (trustline, offer, or data entry) which is sponsored by the given account ID.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: An issued asset represented as “Code:IssuerAccountID”. Every account in the response will have a trustline for the given asset.

parameters.name: claimant
parameters.description: Account ID of the destination address. Only include claimable balances which can be claimed by the given account ID.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: A number that points to a specific location in a collection of responses and is pulled from the paging_token value of a record.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: A designation of the order in which records should appear. Options include `asc` (ascending) or `desc` (descending). If this argument isn’t set, it defaults to `asc`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records returned. The limit can range from 1 to 200 - an upper limit that is hardcoded in Horizon for performance reasons. If this argument isn’t designated, it defaults to 10.
